title: Drug-response data availability flags + references
context: This task flags whether drug-response data exists for each model and links to its open reference, without re-hosting data or making any therapeutic claim (PLAN M2). Depends on the v0.1 release (011); domain reviewer verifies references. Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Add drug-response data availability flags with references for each model, link-only and provenance-stamped, asserting availability not efficacy.
acceptanceCriteria: Each model carries a drugResponseDataAvailable flag with a cited, provenance-stamped reference where data exists; links only, no payloads re-hosted.
Flags assert data availability only - no efficacy, ranking, or therapeutic recommendation (no medical advice).
Domain reviewer spot-checks references before publish.
output: Catalog drug-response availability flags + references dataset, link-only and provenance-stamped.
